data.title: Limoneira reports financial results for Q4 and full FY 2025; focuses on growing ag income and monetizing assets.
data.description: In Santa Paula, California, Limoneira Company (Nasdaq: LMNR), known for its lemon and avocado growing and packing operations along with agribusiness and real estate development, released its financial report for the fiscal fourth quarter and full year ending on October 31, 2025. The company focuses on increasing agricultural revenue and capitalizing on land and water assets as part of its value creation strategy.

data.title: Genomma Lab Internacional announces its fourteenth dividend payment today, a leading company with BMV: LABB.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in Mexico City, Genomma Lab Internacional, S.A.B. de C.V. (BMV: LABB), a prominent pharmaceutical and personal care product company in Mexico with a growing global footprint, announced the successful completion of an undisclosed operation.

data.title: Ramaco Resources to repurchase $100 million of outstanding shares as per new plan authorized by Board of Directors.
data.description: A company based in Lexington, Kentucky, Ramaco Resources, Inc. (NASDAQ: METC, METCB) revealed on December 23, 2025, that its Board of Directors has approved a share repurchase initiative. The program allows for the repurchase of shares worth up to $100 million from the existing outstanding shares of the company.

data.title: Good Times Restaurants' fiscal 2025 results show total revenues of $141.6 million, with total restaurant sales at $39.2 million.
data.description: In Golden, Colorado, Good Times Restaurants Inc. (Nasdaq: GTIM), known for Bad Daddy’s Burger Bar and Good Times Burgers & Frozen Custard, released its financial report for the fiscal fourth quarter and full fiscal year ending on September 30, 2025. The company disclosed that Total Revenues experienced a 0.5% decrease, amounting to $141.6 million for the year compared to the prior fiscal year. Total Restaurant Sales for Good Times restaurants reached $39.2 million during the same period.

data.title: U.S. government leaders to speak at CES 2026, joining other high profile speakers, set to make a significant impact.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in Arlington, Virginia, the Consumer Technology Association (CTA)® revealed new prominent figures to speak at CES® 2026, the renowned global tech gathering. This announcement adds to the already existing lineup of U.S. government speakers, including agency heads and policy experts.

data.title: Concentrix to release Q4 and FY 2025 financial results on Jan 13, 2026, 8:30 am ET, followed by investor conference call.
data.description: Concentrix Corporation, a global technology and services leader, will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 on Tuesday, January 13, 2026. The announcement will be made before the market opens, with a conference call and webcast scheduled for 8:30 am Eastern Time on the same day. During this event, the Company will discuss its financial performance, strategic plans for 2026, and address any queries from analysts. Concentrix trades on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CNXC.
Avista releases new report on corporate responsibility.

data.title: Data Storage Corp extends Offer to Purchase, pushing expiry to Jan 12, 2026, through SEC filing Amendment No. 2.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, a company known as Data Storage Corporation, listed on Nasdaq as DTST, has announced the extension of the Expiration Time for its Offer to Purchase. Originally set for January 7, 2026, the Offer will now be extended to January 12, 2026. To formalize this extension, the Company will be submitting an Amendment No. 2 to its Schedule TO with the Securities and Exchange Commission. The new Expiration Time for the Tender Offer is set for 12:00 Midnight at the end of the day, New York City Time, on Monday, January 12, 2026, unless further extensions are made or if the Offer is terminated earlier.

data.title: Beyond Meat released its 2024 Corporate Responsibility Report & Beyond Burger IV LCA study, submitted to CDP for 1st time.
data.description: In El Segundo, California on December 23, 2025, Beyond Meat, Inc. (NASDAQ: BYND), a notable plant-based meat company, unveiled its 2024 Corporate Responsibility Report alongside the Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) study for Beyond Burger IV. The company's primary objectives are to make a positive impact on human health, climate change, natural resource limitations, and animal welfare. Beyond Meat also confirmed its debut submission to CDP (previously known as the Carbon Disclosure Project), marking a significant step towards environmental accountability and transparency.

data.title: Biotech company begins Biologics License Application for ReNu®, submitting initial modules to FDA under rolling review, final due in first half 2026.
data.description: The FDA has received the first modules for review, with a total of 3 modules expected to be submitted in the rolling review process. The final modules are anticipated to be submitted in the first half of 2026. This regulatory update signifies progress towards the eventual approval of the product under consideration.

data.title: Berger Montague PC investigates Uber's Board of Directors for fiduciary duty breach (NYSE: UBER).
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in Philadelphia, it was reported that Berger Montague PC, a leading plaintiffs' law firm, is informing shareholders of Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) regarding an inquiry into the Company's Board of Directors for possible violations of their fiduciary duties. The investigation focuses on the actions of Uber's Board and their adherence to legal responsibilities towards shareholders. Uber, a notable company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol UBER, and its Board are under scrutiny for potential breaches within their governance. Shareholders are urged to stay informed about this ongoing examination into the company’s leadership.

data.title: Games of the Future 2025 in Abu Dhabi lasted six days, attracting crowds to ADNEC and millions of viewers globally.
data.description: The recent futuristic sporting event held in Abu Dhabi, known as The Games of the Future Abu Dhabi 2025 and sponsored by ADNOC, concluded at ADNEC. The event attracted large crowds in Abu Dhabi and was watched by millions worldwide, showcasing its global popularity.

data.title: Solventum acquires Acera Surgical, expanding medSurg portfolio with synthetic tissue matrices technology in US acute care settings.
data.description: Solventum has extended its MedSurg portfolio to include the rapidly expanding synthetic tissue matrices technology sector within U.S. acute care facilities. This move aims to drive Solventum's business evolution by acquiring a key asset that aligns strategically in a technology adjacent sector. The development, announced on Dec. 23, 2025 in ST. PAUL, Minnesota, is set to facilitate Solventum's growth, leveraging the burgeoning market in this space.

data.title: MDA Space closes C$250M senior unsecured notes offering due 2030. 7.00% interest rate. TSX: MDA. Dec 23, 2025 Brampton, ON.
data.description: In Brampton, Ontario on December 23, 2025, MDA Space Ltd. disclosed the completion of a private placement offering of C$250 million aggregate principal amount of 7.00% senior unsecured notes. The Company, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol MDA, successfully concluded this Offering.
The Government of National Unity in Libya announces official mourning throughout the country for 3 days

data.title: Ramtech Building Systems finished a 26,880 sq ft modular office at Los Alamos National Laboratory, Texas.
data.description: MANSFIELD, Texas - Ramtech Building Systems, based in Mansfield, TX, reported the expansion of their slab-on-grade permanent modular construction projects in the Southwest region. On December 23, 2025, the design-build construction company completed a cutting-edge building spanning 26,880 square feet. The use of Ramtech's innovative construction methods is steadily increasing in popularity in the area.

data.title: ICZOOM Group Inc. (Nasdaq: IZM) to hold EGM on Feb 27, 2026 via teleconference in response to shareholder requisition.
data.description: In Hong Kong on Dec. 23, 2025, ICZOOM Group Inc. (Nasdaq: IZM) disclosed plans for an extraordinary general meeting of shareholders (EGM) scheduled for February 27, 2026, at 10:00 AM U.S. Eastern Time via teleconference. The EGM was called following a Shareholder Requisition submitted on December 5, 2025. The requisition seeks shareholder approval on proposed alterations to the company’s board and management structure.

data.title: Mellow Mushroom franchise ends 2025 with advanced kitchen tech and clear 2026 plan, sets up for growth.
data.description: Mellow Mushroom's strong unit performance in 2025 has paved the way for a promising 2026, with new franchise opportunities on the horizon. The popular psychedelic pizza franchise based in Atlanta announced these results on December 23, 2025. With a focus on their creative pizzas and hand-tossed stone-baked dough, Mellow Mushroom appears poised for continued success moving forward.
